  - main:
    - heading "Our Audience" [ref=e16] [level=2]
    - paragraph:
      - emphasis: 9Tribes
      - text: is Nine’s audience segmentation comprising 68 audience segments across nine verticals.
    - paragraph: Our tribes are based on incredibly rich and credible data from our authenticated users enabling partners with the best targeting capability of any local Australian media organisation.
    - paragraph: They have been built using Nine’s addressable data set and the billions of first party data signals captured from Australians interacting with our content universe, through every touch point, every month.
    - text: "Filter by: Categories All Categories"
